content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services and have built a reputation as a dependable boatworks for boat owners who take their vessels seriously. Whether you're docked in the Chesapeake Bay area or cruising the waters of South Florida, we're here to handle the work that keeps you on the water.

Our team specializes in Boat Surveying & Inspection, Diving & Underwater Services, Marine AC & Climate Control, and Marine Plumbing & Sanitation. From pre-purchase surveys and condition inspections to underwater hull work and through-hull repairs, we cover the full spectrum of what your boat needs. We also service and install marine air conditioning and climate control systems, and handle everything from head systems to holding tanks and freshwater plumbing — the kind of work that keeps life aboard comfortable and code-compliant.

We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. Ben's Boatworks serves boat owners across a 60-mile radius throughout South Florida, from weekend sailors to liveaboards and commercial vessel operators. Our commitment is straightforward: show up, do the work right, and make sure you leave knowing your boat is in good hands. If you're in the Annapolis area or down in South Florida waters, we're the crew you can count on.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!
seoKeywords: boat sanitation system repair South Florida

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough boat surveys and inspections to assess the structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition of your vessel. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or routine condition inspection, we document everything so you know exactly what you're working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, through-hull cleaning, and underwater repairs that keep your vessel performing at its best without hauling out. We handle the work below the waterline so you don't have to schedule a costly haul-out for every underwater issue.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We service, repair, and install marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in warm-weather conditions. From diagnosing refrigerant issues and servicing seawater cooling circuits to full system replacements, we work on a wide range of marine HVAC equipment.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Ben's Boatworks handles all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, including head system repairs, holding tank installation, through-hull fittings, and freshwater system maintenance. Keeping your sanitation and plumbing systems functioning properly is essential for both comfort aboard and compliance with marine environmental regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement dive
